missing_plugins.description: Distorts video using audio waveform shape

missing_plugins.name: Depth Displacement
missing_plugins.description: Pixel displacement driven by depth data

missing_plugins.name: Layer Separation
missing_plugins.description: Separates layers and offsets by depth

missing_plugins.name: Depth Echo
missing_plugins.description: Echoes pixels based on depth values

missing_plugins.name: Depth Visualizer
missing_plugins.description: Basic depth map visualization with colorizing modes

missing_plugins.name: Depth Point Cloud
missing_plugins.description: Renders depth as a point cloud in 3D space

missing_plugins.name: Point Cloud 3D
missing_plugins.description: Enhanced 3D point cloud with camera orbit

missing_plugins.name: Depth Mesh
missing_plugins.description: Creates a triangulated mesh from depth data

missing_plugins.name: Depth Particles 3D
missing_plugins.description: Particle system driven by depth map

missing_plugins.name: Depth Distortion
missing_plugins.description: Distorts video based on depth displacement

missing_plugins.name: Depth Particle Shred
missing_plugins.description: Shreds image into particles using depth

missing_plugins.name: Depth Fracture Datamosh
missing_plugins.description: Datamosh concentrates along depth discontinuity fracture lines with chromatic separation and glow

missing_plugins.name: Depth Temporal Strat
missing_plugins.description: Time-stratified datamosh where near objects are live and far objects show the past

missing_plugins.name: Depth Slit-Scan Datamosh
missing_plugins.description: Depth-modulated slit-scan temporal smearing with 4 scan modes and chromatic splitting

missing_plugins.name: Depth Groovy
missing_plugins.description: Maximalist psychedelic depth datamosh — rainbow cycling, kaleidoscope, spiral vortex, breathing layers, pixel sort, melt

missing_plugins.name: Depth Raver
missing_plugins.description: 3AM rave energy — bass pulse, lasers, thermal vision, euphoria bloom, UV blacklight, strobe

missing_plugins.name: Depth Void
missing_plugins.description: Dark menacing depth datamosh — shadow entities, void crush, bass shake, dread pulse, dark fog

missing_plugins.name: Depth Acid Fractal
missing_plugins.description: Neon fractal mayhem — Julia sets, prism splitting, solarization, cross-processing, film burn

missing_plugins.name: Depth Holographic
missing_plugins.description: Physically-inspired holographic iridescence — thin-film interference, Fresnel, diffraction grating via depth gradients

missing_plugins.name: Depth Reverb
missing_plugins.description: Visual reverb where depth controls room size — near is dry, far is echoed and diffused

missing_plugins.name: Depth Distance Filter
missing_plugins.description: Filter/mask video by depth range — virtual green screen, depth compositing, selective processing

missing_plugins.name: Depth Fog
missing_plugins.description: Atmospheric distance fog — linear/exp/exp² modes, ground fog, animated swirl, light scatter

missing_plugins.name: Depth Blur
missing_plugins.description: Cinematic depth of field — bokeh simulation, tilt-shift, chromatic fringe, aperture shapes

missing_plugins.name: Depth Edge Glow
missing_plugins.description: Neon depth contour glow — multi-scale edges, topographic contours, bloom, pulsing neon outlines

missing_plugins.name: Depth Color Grade
missing_plugins.description: 3-zone depth color grading — independent hue/sat/temp/exposure per band, film curves

missing_plugins.name: Depth Dual
missing_plugins.description: Dual depth camera effect — collision, interference, volumetric, XOR, parallax from 2 depth cameras

missing_plugins.name: Depth Simulator
missing_plugins.description: Estimates depth from regular 2D video — no depth camera needed. Output feeds into any depth effect.

missing_plugins.name: Depth Camera Splitter
missing_plugins.description: Splits depth camera into separate color, depth, IR, and colorized streams

missing_plugins.name: Depth Data Mux
missing_plugins.description: 1-to-N depth data multiplexer — fan out one depth source to multiple effects. Dynamically expandable.

missing_plugins.name: Depth FX Loop
missing_plugins.description: Effects send/return with depth gating and feedback — create routing loops in the graph

missing_plugins.name: Depth Modular Datamosh
missing_plugins.description: Datamosh with built-in effects loop — inject external effects INTO the datamosh chain

missing_plugins.name: V-Maths
missing_plugins.description: Analog computer: dual function generator + dual attenuverter

missing_plugins.name: ML Style Transfer
missing_plugins.description: Neural style transfer with preset color palettes and GPU shaders

missing_plugins.name: ML Segmentation Blur
missing_plugins.description: Selective blur using ML-based person segmentation

missing_plugins.name: ML Depth Estimation
missing_plugins.description: Monocular depth estimation using MiDaS model with depth-of-field and colormapping

missing_plugins.name: V-Moddemix
missing_plugins.description: Dual-channel amplitude modulation with thru-zero VCA

missing_plugins.name: Advanced 3D Particles
missing_plugins.description: Full-featured 3D particle system with emitters, forces, and flocking

missing_plugins.name: Particle System 3D
missing_plugins.description: Basic 3D boids particle system with flocking and audio reactivity

missing_plugins.name: Shadertoy Particles
missing_plugins.description: GPU particle system with audio-reactive physics and attraction/repulsion

missing_plugins.name: Fire Particles
missing_plugins.description: Realistic fire particle simulation with upward drift and heat shimmer

missing_plugins.name: Nebula Particles
missing_plugins.description: Nebula/gas cloud particle system with slow flowing motion

missing_plugins.name: Audio Raymarched Scenes
missing_plugins.description: Audio-reactive 3D raymarched environments: spheres, tunnels, fractals

missing_plugins.name: Ben-Day Dots
missing_plugins.description: Comic book halftone dot pattern effect
